Statute I I shall be substituted as under: CoDstitution of Executive Council I l. (l) The Executive Council ofthe Universrty shall consist of the following membels: a) Vice-Chancellor; b) Pro-Vice-Chancellor; c) Secretary, Depanment of Higher Education, MHRD, GoI or his/her nominee not below fte rank of Jornt Secretary: d) Chairman, UCC or his/her nominee: e) Secretary of the State Covemment dealing with matters relating to Higher Education; 0 Four persons of distinction in academics ro b€ nominated by the visitor; g) Thee eminent academicians not in the service of the University, to be nominated by rhe MHRD from iunonBst a panel recommended by the Executive Council; h) One member of the Court nominated by the visrror; i) Three Deans of Sch<nls of Studies by rotation according to senioriry; j) One Professor, who is not a Dean, by rotation according rc seniority, to be nominated by the vice- Chancellor: and k) One Associate Pmfessor who is not a Dean, by rotalion according to seniority to be nominated by the Vice- Chancellor- Term of omce (2) Term of office of the members of the Executive Council, other than the ex-officio members, shall be tlree years. The Centres of Studies shall provide physical and intellecrual space to facilitare, undenake and promote inler-disciplinary and thrust area research.
